Our Team

Experienced financial professionals with deep expertise in financial management and strategic advisory

About Our Practice

Led by Experienced Financial Professionals

Our team brings decades of experience supporting businesses, startups and mission-driven organizations, strengthening financial governance, modernizing financial systems, and improving operational efficiency across diverse environments.

Founder & Managing Partner

Sorphoan Ear

LinkedIn Profile

Sorphoan Ear is the Founder and Managing Partner of NP CFO Advisory LLC. He brings more than 25 years of experience in financial management, operations leadership, and financial systems implementation across audit firms, nonprofit organizations, international development programs, and private sector enterprises.

Throughout his career, Sorphoan has led financial oversight for complex projects managing multi-million-dollar portfolios, strengthening financial governance, improving reporting, implementing enterprise financial systems, and advising executive leadership teams on strategy and operational efficiency.

His experience spans financial leadership across numerous countries including the United States, Afghanistan, Cambodia, and Lao PDR.

Areas of Expertise

  • ›Fractional CFO leadership
  • ›Financial strategy, budgeting, and forecasting
  • ›ERP and financial systems implementation
  • ›Financial dashboards and data-driven reporting
  • ›Internal controls and governance strengthening
  • ›Compliance reviews and financial risk assessments
  • ›Workflow automation and operational efficiency
Co-Founder & Senior Financial Advisor

Ravindral Suaris

LinkedIn Profile

Ravindral A. Suaris is a senior financial management professional with more than 30 years of experience leading complex financial operations for international development programs and U.S. government agencies.

He has served in senior financial leadership roles within USAID, including Controller and Supervisory Controller positions responsible for overseeing large international portfolios and complex financial management systems.

His experience spans financial leadership across numerous countries including the United States, Indonesia, Afghanistan, Nigeria, Georgia, Sri Lanka, Kenya, Ethiopia, Pakistan, and across Latin America.

Our Collaborative Network

NP CFO Advisory LLC collaborates with a network of experienced finance professionals with backgrounds in accounting, financial reporting, grant compliance, and operational finance — delivering high-quality advisory services tailored to each organization's needs.
